title: Easy Copper Cutter 🪚
description: Craft Any Copper Block in The StoneCutter!
body:
**🪚 Easy Copper Cutter**

Cut copper the smart way!
With Easy Copper Cutter, you can finally use the Stonecutter to craft any type of copper block — just like you can with stone!

**⚙️ Features**

Use the Stonecutter to convert a Copper Block into any copper variant
Includes:

Cut Copper

Cut Copper Stairs

Cut Copper Slabs

Waxed variants of all the above

Exposed, Weathered, and Oxidized forms

And a lot more! 66+ new recipes, Craft smart. Build shiny. Cut copper easy. ⚡
Yes, we will update to 1.21.10 and support the copper age update soon!
No more crafting tables full of messy recipes — just slice and shape your copper with precision!
